changeSet.author: grc-platform
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.change_tracking_tables WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.organizations') ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE dbo.organizations ENABLE CHANGE_TRACKING WITH (TRACK_COLUMNS_UPDATED = OFF); END

rollback.sql: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.change_tracking_tables WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.organizations') ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE dbo.organizations DISABLE CHANGE_TRACKING; END

changeSet.author: grc-platform
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.change_tracking_tables WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.users') ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE dbo.users ENABLE CHANGE_TRACKING WITH (TRACK_COLUMNS_UPDATED = OFF); END

rollback.sql: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys.change_tracking_tables WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.users') ) BEGIN ALTER TABLE dbo.users DISABLE CHANGE_TRACKING; END
